expectations.text: The output contains exactly 3 user stories and does not invent UI stories or browser verification.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Personal Access Token Backend",
  "branchName": "personal-access-token-backend",
  "description": "Add personal access token backend.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add hashed token storage",
      "description": "As a system, I want hashed token storage with a nullable revocation timestamp so token state is durable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Token hashes are stored.",
        "Nullable revocation timestamp defaults to null.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add create-token server action",
      "description": "As a system, I want a create-token server action that validates label length and returns the plaintext token once.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Label length is validated.",
        "The plaintext token is returned once.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add revoke-token server action",
      "description": "As a system, I want a revoke-token server action that marks the token revoked without deleting it.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoked tokens stay stored.",
        "Tokens are marked revoked without deletion.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
